amendments.reason: Include the gate-record file itself (committed evidence per ADR-042 §3.6).

ADR-042 Addendum 1 D9 migration: remove docs/audit/full-audit-latest.json from the git index. .gitignore already lists it but the file was tracked from before; D9 explicitly requires  not just .gitignore.

spec.rationale: fix matches existing ADRAddendumFrontmatter routing in loaders.py and frontmatter_lint.py; ADR-042 governance contract is unchanged

known_debt: Pre-existing repo-wide debt tracked under #1287: 19 ADR/spec files without ADR-042 frontmatter trigger frontmatter_lint (19) + doc_drift (36) + closure (21). signature_drift (98) and architecture_drift (135) are pre-existing facts vs adr-042-consistency-tools.md drift, tracked separately. This PR removes the 2 addendum1-specific findings (1 in doc_drift, 1 in closure) and touches no other surface.

owner_directive: Per #1287 item B: route ADR addendum files through ADRAddendumFrontmatter in _util loader; investigation first, then 5-10 line fix + unit test.
